languages.text: "Остерегайся капитана Зауэрбэка. Он за тобой приглядывает".
languages.translation_comment: Раз в таймлуп, видел DL_JarubInterrogation_dialogue, не играет DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead, играет DL_KnowTimeloop и DL_HelpingJarub

languages.text: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."
languages.original_text: "Остерегайся капитана Зауэрбэка. Он за тобой приглядывает".

traits.locale_text: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."
"Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."
"Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."

languages.text: «Cuidado con el capitán Sauerback. Le tiene fichado».
languages.original_text: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."

traits.locale_text: «Cuidado con el capitán Sauerback. Le tiene fichado».

languages.text: “小心苏尔贝克上尉，他盯上你了。”
languages.original_text: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."

traits.locale_text: “小心苏尔贝克上尉，他盯上你了。”

languages.text: « Méfiez-vous du capitaine Sauerback. Il vous tient à l'œil. »
languages.original_text: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."

traits.locale_text: « Méfiez-vous du capitaine Sauerback. Il vous tient à l'œil. »

languages.original_text: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."

languages.text: "Hütet Euch vor Captain Sauerback. Er beobachtet Euch."
languages.original_text: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."

traits.locale_text: "Hütet Euch vor Captain Sauerback. Er beobachtet Euch."

languages.text: 「サウアーバック大佐に気をつけなさい。彼は君を狙っている。」
languages.original_text: "Watch out for Captain Sauerback. He's got his eye on you."

traits.locale_text: 「サウアーバック大佐に気をつけなさい。彼は君を狙っている。」
